instruction_packet_target.task_type: derive | check | compare | summarize | translate | construct | review
instruction_packet_target.declared_goal: Bounded solver/model goal permitted by the source posture.
instruction_packet_target.expected_artifact_type: derivation | proof_attempt | counterexample | summary | mapping | test_plan

allowed_source_use: How the source may be used in the instruction packet.
disallowed_source_use: How the source may not be used.
claim_limit: Maximum claim that may be made from the source-to-instruction mapping.
